_publications._publicationTitle: Immortalization and characterization of Schwann cell lines derived from NF1-associated cutaneous neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: icNF98.4c has the lowest pERK:ERK ratio, which is difficult to interpret given that the germline pathogenic variant results in out-of-frame skipping of exon 43, and the somatic mutation is deletion of the gene
details: Showed lowest pERK:ERK ratio despite predicted high pERK from germline and somatic mutations
